_taf_mirror_metadata.purpose: Mirrored verbatim so TAF consumers can dispatch to the upstream's 18 bridge domains and 6 hardware modules without requiring the external repo to be installed. When upstream IS installed, TAF's accessor in schemas/geometric_bridge_contract.py prefers the live manifest; otherwise it falls back to this file.
_taf_mirror_metadata.ingestion_warning: Edits to this file should be paired with an upstream issue. The bridge_domains list and silicon_entry_point strings are the consumer-facing contract.

bridge_domains.name: sound
bridge_domains.notes: Couples to pressure-wave structure in a compressible medium through phase, frequency, amplitude, and resonance behavior.

bridge_domains.name: electric
bridge_domains.notes: Couples to charge flow and field behavior through conduction, skin depth, impedance, and threshold crossings.

bridge_domains.name: gravity
bridge_domains.notes: Couples to gravitational potential structure through curvature, tidal response, bound-state behavior, and balance points.

bridge_domains.name: magnetic
bridge_domains.notes: Couples to magnetic field structure and field-comparison geometry.

bridge_domains.name: light
bridge_domains.notes: Couples to optical wavelength, intensity, and radiative field structure.

bridge_domains.name: pressure
bridge_domains.notes: Couples to pressure-state geometry and compressive field response.

bridge_domains.name: thermal
bridge_domains.notes: Couples to thermal gradients, dissipation, and heat-flow structure.

bridge_domains.name: wave
bridge_domains.notes: Couples to generalized wave propagation, coherence, and interference structure.

bridge_domains.name: chemical
bridge_domains.notes: Couples to concentration, reactivity, and chemical-state transition structure.

bridge_domains.name: community
bridge_domains.notes: Concrete human-organism and settlement-scale instantiation of resilience through reserves, redundancy, and knowledge continuity.

bridge_domains.name: resilience
bridge_domains.notes: Substrate-independent resilience encoder for viability, reserves, cascading risk, and mutual resilience across axes.

bridge_domains.name: biomachine
bridge_domains.notes: Couples seal stress, material limits, thermal headroom, and regenerative machine-state dynamics as a physical maintenance and recovery field.

bridge_domains.name: coop
bridge_domains.notes: Couples cooperative trust propagation, resource redistribution, and network growth as a thermal-style adoption and transport field.

bridge_domains.name: cyclic
bridge_domains.notes: Couples cyclic field evolution through resonance, regeneration, phase transitions, fractal spawning, and spatial gradients.

bridge_domains.name: vortex
bridge_domains.notes: Couples topological memory winding structure into a dynamic per-slot binary payload, preserving vortex orientation and winding magnitude.

bridge_domains.name: geometric_fiber
bridge_domains.notes: Detects whether a globally consistent physical-to-computational mapping exists by probing fiber transport and holonomy.

bridge_domains.name: consciousness
bridge_domains.notes: Meta-layer encoder for consciousness-state structure and bridge-coupled internal state estimation.

bridge_domains.name: emotion
bridge_domains.notes: Meta-layer encoder for affective state geometry and cross-bridge resonance / drill-down guidance.
